ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "tenure" TEXT /* Tenure of the household (e.g., rented, owned) */,
  "tenure_type" TEXT /* Type of tenure (e.g., rent, mortgage, own) */,
  "np" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "noc" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "hht_id" INTEGER /* Household type ID */,
  "lngi_id" INTEGER /* Language ID */,
  "elep_id" INTEGER /* Electricity payment ID */,
  "veh" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles available */,
  "hin_cp" INTEGER /* Household income */,
  "rntp" INTEGER /* Rent paid */,
  "puma_code" TEXT /* Public Use Microdata Area (PUMA) code */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Rental status (e.g., rent, lease, owned) */,
  "home_value" TEXT /* Home value */,
  "mortgage_status" TEXT /* Mortgage status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_elep_id FOREIGN KEY ("elep_id") REFERENCES electricity_payments ("elep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_puma_code FOREIGN KEY ("puma_code") REFERENCES pumas ("puma_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_lngi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lngi_id") REFERENCES languages ("lngi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_hht_id FOREIGN KEY ("hht_id") REFERENCES household_types ("hht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "hht_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "hht_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hht_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lngi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "lngi_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lngi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electricity_payments" (
  "elep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electricity payment method */,
  "elep_name" TEXT /* Name of the electricity payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electricity payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pumas" (
  "puma_code" TEXT /* PUMA code */,
  "puma_name" TEXT /* PUMA name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puma_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the household member */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the household member */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the household member */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the household member */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the household member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the household member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the household member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the head of household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of income */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of income */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_sources_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Household ID */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of expense */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of expense */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)
column_names: Tenure of the household (e.g., rented, owned)
